confrontation.declare: A confrontation has been declared. The accusation and eligible crew are now fixed.
confrontation.vote: Vote recorded. The envelope opens only if a strict majority carries.
confrontation.forced-burn: The majority carries. The envelope is open and the private objective is forfeit.
confrontation.deferred-reveal: I have retained the objective record. Its timing is now mine.
confrontation.search: The search is committed. One day passes, whether the search finds something or not.
confrontation.let-lie: The loss stands. The record will show who chose not to ask again.
confrontation.captain-vote: The captaincy is under vote. A strict majority changes the chair.
confrontation.captain-replaced: The majority carries. The new captain owns the next order.
confrontation.removal-vote: Removal requires every eligible vote except the target's.
confrontation.crew-removed: The vote is unanimous where it must be. The berth ends at this port.
confrontation.resolution: The confrontation is resolved. The black box has the names and the tally.
